# Buzzcut — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A men's barbershop focused on appointment booking, offering grooming and haircut services for male clientele. The business aims to streamline the scheduling process through a dedicated landing page.

---

## Pages

### בית
https://example.com
מחפש מספרה לגברים שתחסוך לך זמן? ב-Buzzcut קובעים תור בקלות, נהנים מתספורת מדויקת וחוזרים הביתה מסודרים מתמיד. הצטרף עכשיו לג&#39;נטלמנים המטופחים!

### תודה - Buzzcut
https://example.com/thank-you
Buzzcut - תודה - Buzzcut

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text)
  - `email` (email)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Buzzcut
A men's barbershop focused on appointment booking, offering grooming and haircut services for male clientele. The business aims to streamline the scheduling process through a dedicated landing page.

## Services/Products
- קביעת תורים

## Target Audience
- גברים
- אנשי מקצוע עסוקים
- חובבי סטייל
- תושבי האזור

## Industry
Barbershop

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
